# LearnableNeuralCircuit Benchmark Report

*Generated by `train.logic.train_benchmark` (commit `05c1066`, plan_2026-05-13_25774a34).*
*GPU: RTX 4070 (12 GB), wall-clock 3m 38s, seed=42, 100 max epochs with early-stopping.*
*Reproduce with: `MPLBACKEND=Agg .venv/bin/python -m train.logic.train_benchmark --gpu 1 --epochs 100`*

---

## Headline

- **majority_k6**: best soft test acc = **1.0000** (circuit, 513 params, 21 epochs)
  - Circuit faithfulness: soft=1.0000 hard=1.0000 Δ=+0.0000 (FAITHFUL)
- **multiplexer_6**: best soft test acc = **1.0000** (circuit, 513 params, 22 epochs)
  - Circuit faithfulness: soft=1.0000 hard=1.0000 Δ=+0.0000 (FAITHFUL)
- **parity_k6**: best soft test acc = **1.0000** (circuit, 513 params, 23 epochs)
  - Circuit faithfulness: soft=1.0000 hard=1.0000 Δ=+0.0000 (FAITHFUL)
- **shift_xor_k8**: best soft test acc = **0.9919** (mlp_large, 1608 params, 22 epochs)
  - Circuit faithfulness: soft=0.9637 hard=0.9567 Δ=-0.0070 (FAITHFUL)

## majority_k6 — y = 1 iff sum(x) >= 3 — linearly separable

| Model | Params | Soft Test Acc | Exact Acc | Hard Test Acc | Hard Exact | Epochs | Wall (s) | Roundtrip Δ |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| circuit | 513 | 1.0000 | 1.0000 | 1.0000 | 1.0000 | 21 | 25.12 | 0.00e+00 |
| mlp_matched | 533 | 1.0000 | 1.0000 | — | — | 22 | 10.85 | 0.00e+00 |
| mlp_large | 1313 | 1.0000 | 1.0000 | — | — | 21 | 11.21 | 0.00e+00 |

## shift_xor_k8 — y[i] = x[i] XOR x[(i+1) mod 8] — multi-output per_channel

## Faithfulness summary

Hard extraction replaces each inner op's `operation_weights` with a one-hot at the argmax (LARGE × one_hot) so softmax is numerically one-hot. Re-evaluates without retraining. |Δ| < 0.05 ⇒ readout faithful.

| Task | Soft | Hard | Δ | Verdict |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| majority_k6 | 1.0000 | 1.0000 | +0.0000 | FAITHFUL |
| multiplexer_6 | 1.0000 | 1.0000 | +0.0000 | FAITHFUL |
| parity_k6 | 1.0000 | 1.0000 | +0.0000 | FAITHFUL |
| shift_xor_k8 | 0.9637 | 0.9567 | -0.0070 | FAITHFUL |
